title: AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) Project Research Scientist-I Notification 2026 has been released on 12-05-2026 on the official website aiimsbathinda.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a First Class Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degree or Second Class Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degree with PhD, along with prior experience in Biochemical/molecular biology, sample handling and hospital/clinical research, are eligible to apply fo

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bathinda (AIIMS Bathinda) Project Research Scientist-I Notification 2026 has been released on 12-05-2026 on the official website aiimsbathinda.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a First Class Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degree or Second Class Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degree with PhD, along with prior experience in Biochemical/molecular biology, sample handling and hospital/clinical research, are eligible to apply fo

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.details: First Class Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degree or Second Class Post Graduate Degree including integrated PG degree with PhD. Prior experience in Biochemical/molecular biology, sample handling and hospital/clinical research. Proficient in MS Word/Excel.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bathinda to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist-I recruitment is 28th May 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by AIIMS Bathinda?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bathinda has released a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Project Research Scientist-I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class Post Graduate Degree including an integrated PG degree or a Second Class Post Graduate Degree including an integrated PG degree with PhD. Prior experience in relevant fields is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I post is 35 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided and should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 56,000 to Rs. 61,600 per month, which includes basic pay and HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve an Interview and potentially a Written Test. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the AIIMS Bathinda Project Research Scientist-I job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of AIIMS Bathinda or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Project Research Scientist-I is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
